content.text:
Resuming Sprint 06: the prior session actually completed everything — commit `9ab840f8`, full QA gate, visual audit, handover — and then died on the $25 budget cap *after* the commit. The only damage is the orchestrator-cleared `plans/status/sprint-06.PASS` (an uncommitted deletion of a tracked file). Plan: inspect the tree, honestly re-run the deterministic gate (build + verify + facts) against the committed tree, then restore the marker.

```diff
+ [KEY] Sprint-06 ka kaam pichhle session mein COMMIT ho chuka hai (9ab840f8) — sirf PASS marker delete hua hai (resume ke liye orchestrator ne hataya). Code dobara banane ki zaroorat nahi.
+ [DECISION] Marker wapas likhne se pehle QA gate (build + verify + facts) dobara chala ke confirm karunga — PROTOCOL §5 ke hisaab se PASS tabhi jab gate sach mein green ho.
```

content.text:
**Sprint 06 is PASS — fully recovered.** The prior session had already finished and committed everything (`9ab840f8`); it only died on the $25 budget cap after the commit, and the orchestrator cleared the PASS marker for this resume run. I re-verified the gate honestly and restored the marker.

- **Re-run gate results (this session, against the committed tree):**
  - `npm run build` → exit 0, 174.00 KB gz initial JS (budget ≤220, zero `three` bytes)
  - `node scripts/qa/verify.mjs` → **209/209** (all routes/tiers, axe+contrast, leak/orphan checks, S06 home suite)
  - `node scripts/qa/facts_check.mjs` → **21/21**
  - Screenshots intact: `/tmp/shots/sprint-06/` (desktop+mobile+preloader) + `/tmp/shots-dense/home/` (16 frames)
  - Dev server killed; tree clean; `plans/status/sprint-06.PASS` restored via `git restore` (it's tracked in `9ab840f8` — no second commit, one-commit-per-sprint preserved)
- **Visual audit not re-spawned:** the fresh-eyes auditor + adversarial scar reviewer ran last session on these exact frames and this exact tree (verdict FIX→accepted-with-reasons / SHIP, recorded in the committed `plans/handover/sprint-06.md`); nothing changed since, so re-running would burn budget for zero new information.
- **Handover** `plans/handover/sprint-06.md` is complete and committed — including the S10/S11 mount contracts and the "Home owns hero+pipeline; Work owns skyline; testimonials on Home" statement.

```diff
+ [KEY] Sprint-06 PASS hai — commit 9ab840f8 pehle se sahi tha; is session mein sirf gate dobara verify karke (209/209, 21/21, build 0) PASS marker restore kiya.
+ [GOTCHA] Pichhla run budget cap se mara tha, kaam fail hone se nahi — aage ke sprints mein ultracode audit ko thoda lean rakhna better hai taaki cap se pehle marker likh jaye.
+ [NEXT] Chain ab S07 (Work route — skyline mount) pe aage badh sakti hai; handover ke warnings (SplitLines ctx.add, Sender iframe force-click, orphan-based leak gate) wahan binding hain.
```
